ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test type (e.g., valid name, valid email) */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the step identifier */,
  "test_case_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test case */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test case (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES steps ("step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "test_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type (e.g., valid name, valid email) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test type was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test type */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the test type was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step identifier */,
  "step_name" TEXT /* Name of the step identifier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the step identifier */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the step identifier */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the step identifier was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the step identifier */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the step identifier was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_keywords" (
  "search_keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search keyword */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Searched keyword */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the searched keyword */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the search keyword */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the search keyword was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the search keyword */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the search keyword was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_keywords_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_names" (
  "page_name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page name */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "page_name" TEXT /* Page name */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the page name */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the page name */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the page name was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the page name */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the page name was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_names_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expected_results" (
  "expected_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expected result */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "expected_result" TEXT /* Expected result */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expected result */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the expected result */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the expected result was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the expected result */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the expected result was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expected_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expected_results_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expected_search_keys" (
  "expected_search_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expected search key */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "expected_search_key" TEXT /* Expected search key */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expected search key */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the expected search key */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the expected search key was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the expected search key */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the expected search key was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expected_search_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expected_search_keys_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_files" (
  "test_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test file */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the test file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the test file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the test file was uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the test file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the test file (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the test file */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test file was uploaded */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test file */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the test file was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_files_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_execution_history" (
  "test_execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test execution */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date the test was executed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test execution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test execution */,
  "executed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the test */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to execute the test in seconds */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test execution history */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test execution history was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test execution history */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the test execution history was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_execution_history_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., tester, developer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the user account */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_execution_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "test_execution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test execution */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level (e.g., info, warn, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_execution_log_test_execution_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_execution_id") REFERENCES test_execution_history ("test_execution_id")
)
